title: mikania scandens var. pubescens
intro: Mikania scandens var. pubescens, also known as the hairy wine cup, is a perennial vine native to South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Mikania scandens var. pubescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its roots to create a tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments.
